evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); MOS.abrirModalPrecioCurvas('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); const sats=document.querySelectorAll('#pcSatelites .pc-sat-precio'); r.nSatelites=sats.length; r.satPrecios=[...sats].map(i=>i.value); const inp=document.getElementById('pcPrecio'); const antes=[...sats].map(i=>i.value); if(inp){inp.value='20';inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,500)); r.satRecalcula=[...document.querySelectorAll('#pcSatelites .pc-sat-precio')].map(i=>i.value); r.btnLbl=(document.getElementById('pcGuardarLbl')||{}).textContent; return r; })()
